Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class BankRelationships

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.BankRelationships
All Implemented Interfaces:
SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsCancelBankRelationship, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsCreateBankRelationship, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsGetBankRelationship, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsListBankRelationships, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsReissueMicroDeposits, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsUpdateBankRelationship, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsVerifyMicroDeposits

    • listBankRelationships

      public BankRelationshipsListBankRelationshipsResponse listBankRelationships(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<? extends State> state) throws Exception
      List Bank Relationships Lists bank relationships for an account.
      Specified by:
      listBankRelationships in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsListBankRelationships
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of bank relationships to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 50 bank relationships will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListBankRelationships` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page. When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListBankRelationships` must match the call that provided the page token.
      state - The state of bank relationships to filter by. Unspecified returns relationships of all states.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public BankRelationshipsGetBankRelationshipRequestBuilder getBankRelationship()

      public BankRelationshipsUpdateBankRelationshipResponse updateBankRelationship(String accountId, String bankRelationshipId, Optional<String> updateMask, BankRelationshipUpdate bankRelationshipUpdate) throws Exception
      Update Bank Relationship Updates an existing bank relationship.
      Specified by:
      updateBankRelationship in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsUpdateBankRelationship
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      bankRelationshipId - The bankRelationship id.
      updateMask - The field of the bank relationship to update. Only `nickname` is supported.
      bankRelationshipUpdate - A relationship between a bank account and an Apex account.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • verifyMicroDeposits

      public BankRelationshipsVerifyMicroDepositsRequestBuilder verifyMicroDeposits()
      Verify Micro Deposits Verifies a pending bank relationship with the `MICRO_DEPOSIT` verification method. Successful verification of the micro deposit amounts will result in the relationship moving to the `APPROVED` state. The micro deposits will be taken back from the bank account.
      Returns:
      The call builder

    • verifyMicroDeposits

      public BankRelationshipsVerifyMicroDepositsResponse verifyMicroDeposits(String accountId, String bankRelationshipId, VerifyMicroDepositsRequestCreate verifyMicroDepositsRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Verify Micro Deposits Verifies a pending bank relationship with the `MICRO_DEPOSIT` verification method. Successful verification of the micro deposit amounts will result in the relationship moving to the `APPROVED` state. The micro deposits will be taken back from the bank account.
      Specified by:
      verifyMicroDeposits in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsVerifyMicroDeposits
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      bankRelationshipId - The bankRelationship id.
      verifyMicroDepositsRequestCreate - Verifies micro deposits for a pending relationship.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • reissueMicroDeposits

      public BankRelationshipsReissueMicroDepositsRequestBuilder reissueMicroDeposits()
      Reissue Micro Deposits Reissues micro deposits after micro deposit verification has failed. The user should have received a message that new micro deposits should be reissued.
      Returns:
      The call builder

    • reissueMicroDeposits

      public BankRelationshipsReissueMicroDepositsResponse reissueMicroDeposits(String accountId, String bankRelationshipId, ReissueMicroDepositsRequestCreate reissueMicroDepositsRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Reissue Micro Deposits Reissues micro deposits after micro deposit verification has failed. The user should have received a message that new micro deposits should be reissued.
      Specified by:
      reissueMicroDeposits in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallBankRelationshipsReissueMicroDeposits
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      bankRelationshipId - The bankRelationship id.
      reissueMicroDepositsRequestCreate - Request to reissue micro deposits for bank relationship verification.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
